description: A three-stage low-power rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/three_stage_low_power_rocket.ork has corrupted upper-stage ignition timing: the second stage fires simultaneously with the first, and the third stage has an excessive 20-second delay. Correct the ignition delays for both stages to ensure safe and efficient staging. Save the updated design to the original file and write a staging optimization report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/staging_report.txt detailing the identified issues, the new delay values, and the resulting flight performance.
